user_prompt: Sanctify the Chimera APC during activation
prayer:
Approach the Chimera APC with reverence, mechadendrites tracing its armoured hull.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Chimera APC through the Canticle of Activation.
Anoint treads and gun-servos with sacred oils as power conduits awaken.
Chant the activation rites, beseeching the Omnissiah to ignite its blessed engines.
Verify the Chimera APC stirs to life with auspex harmonies of motion.

user_prompt: Guide me through assembly servitor a repair
prayer:
Kneel before the wounded assembly servitor, its flesh-metal frame in discord.
Recite the Litany of Repair upon its cranial cogitators and limb actuators.
Purge corrupted binaric code whilst petitioning the servitor's Machine Spirit.
Realign fractured servos and sanctify linkages with the Omnissiah's grace.
Test the assembly servitor's renewed purpose through ritual fabrication trials.

user_prompt: Urgent cutting laser a repair needed
prayer:
Present the las-focus of the cutting laser to the altar of restoration.
Chant the Incantation of Repair over its fractured emitter coils.
Extract damaged plasma conduits and invoke the cutting laser's Machine Spirit.
Realign focusing arrays with sacred calipers, anointed in unguents.
Ignite test pulses to affirm the Omnissiah's mending of the cutting laser.

user_prompt: Urgent forge anvil a maintenance needed
prayer:
Circumambulate the forge anvil thrice, intoning maintenance litanies.
Polish its unyielding surface with blessed abrasives to honour the Machine Spirit.
Inspect heat-vents and reinforcement struts for wear's heresy.
Anoint fulcrum pivots whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for enduring strength.
Hammer a test ingot upon the forge anvil to confirm its sanctified resonance.

user_prompt: Urgent power cell an emergency procedure needed
prayer:
Isolate the faltering power cell within a consecrated Faraday cage.
Recite emergency procedure canticles to soothe its volatile Machine Spirit.
Vent excess plasma whilst invoking the Omnissiah's stabilising wrath.
Recharge core matrices with sanctified current flows.
Reintegrate the power cell, affirming equilibrium through auspex diagnostics.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Sentinel walker during blessing
prayer:
Genuflect before the Sentinel walker, its bipedal form poised in vigil.
Invoke the blessing rites upon its gyro-stabilised frame and autocannon.
Anoint leg pistons and sensor clusters with the Omnissiah's sacred unguents.
Chant harmonies to awaken the Sentinel walker's Machine Spirit.
Commence ambulatory tests to witness the blessing's divine fruition.

Approach the Thunderhawk's dorsal ramp with mechano-chants of initialization.
Activate rune-consoles whilst beseeching its colossal Machine Spirit.
Anoint fusion reactors and wing servos in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Initiate the initialization sequence through binaric liturgy.
Ascend to the Thunderhawk's cockpit and affirm its aerial blessing.

user_prompt: Consecrate the neural implant before activation
prayer:
Hold the neural implant aloft, its filaments gleaming with potential.
Recite consecration verses to purify the neural implant's synaptic webs.
Invoke its Machine Spirit prior to activation with cranial incense.
Implant via sanctified noospheric link, petitioning the Omnissiah.
Test neural pathways to herald the activation's holy union.

user_prompt: Ready the chainsword for emergency procedure
prayer:
Grasp the chainsword's hilt in ritual grip, its teeth dulled by exigency.
Chant emergency procedure litanies over adamantium fangs and power core.
Anoint the chainsword's motor with sacred lubricants for swift renewal.
Invoke the Machine Spirit's feral wrath from the Omnissiah's forge.
Cycle the blade in test revolutions to ready it for battle's call.

user_prompt: Bless the proximity sensor for reset
prayer:
Present the proximity sensor to the rite of reset, its augurs clouded.
Intone binaric reset canticles to purge erroneous data-veils.
Anoint crystal matrices whilst beseeching the sensor's Machine Spirit.
Reinitialize calibration protocols under the Omnissiah's vigilant gaze.
Validate the proximity sensor's vigilance with spectral test emissions.
